title: Glade Air Freshener, Aerosol Room Spray, Clean Linen, 300ml
features: Linen scent is given a modern twist with added notes of watery melon, crisp air and sparkling citrus
Air freshener for home designed to fight tough odours, infused with essential oils
Battery operated air freshener spray conserves refills by switching to lock-out mode for 20 minutes after spraying
description: Product Description Bring back memories of fresh line-dried laundry with Glade Clean Linen room freshener spray. It�s been given a modern twist with notes of watery melon, crisp air and sparkling citrus that delight your senses. Designed to fight tough odours and leave behind a fresh fragrance, Glade air fresheners can be used on a daily basis or as the final touch after your cleaning routine. The fresh linen scent will delight you, instantly infusing the air with passionately crafted fragrances. Directions Shake can well. To freshen the air, point can towards the centre of the room and spray. This product is not recommended for use on fabrics. Safety Warning Danger Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurised container: May burst if heated. Keep out of reach of children. If in eyes: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rising. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50�C. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Do not breathe spray. Caution. Use only as directed. Use only in well-ventilated areas. People suffering from perfume sensitivity should be cautious when using this product. Air fresheners do not replace good hygiene practices.
